name: Orange Topped Sugar Rounds
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange pieces of cookie dough on 2 large cookie sheets. Bake according to package directions. Cool on a wire rack for 5 minutes.
2. In a bowl, stir together the whipped cream cheese, honey, and lemon juice.
3. Spread some of the mixture atop each cooled cookie.
4. Top each cookie with a drained mandarin orange section.
